title: PostgreSQL Search, Language Policy, Ranking, Plans, and Safe Snippets
description: Queries concatenate text, raw HTML becomes tsvector input, one language is assumed, rank looks objective, snippets return unsafe tags, and expensive searches lack budgets. Learners cumulatively produce bounded runtime-validated reader search through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Build weighted tsvector documents from admitted safe text with language, provenance, refresh, and deletion policy.
Validate length, token count, mode, language, filters, and empty results before using parameterized plainto, websearch, or explicit tsquery.
Verify representative GIN-backed plans, selectivity, scale, write amplification, latency, row limits, and plan-change thresholds.
